creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Jan 03, 2012 at 10:50:13AM +0000, Krzysztof Stryjek thus spake:
> I've checked this patch in my tinderbox and everything passed without
> errors.

Insert humble opinion:

To truly validate this as a package installation, I would argue that not
only does it need to pass in tinderbox, but it also would also need to be
added as a dependency of another package to test its' packaging validation.
I don't see that collectd is required by anything, though. I've seen too
many packages not pass this test.

-jgh
